Gate Operation SOP
Standard operating procedure · Last updated Apr 29, 2026 · Lido Property
Safety first: Never stand in the gate's swing path during operation. Keep residents and vehicles clear before initiating any reset.
Normal operation
1
Use the keypad or remote
Enter the 4-digit code on the entry keypad, or use the Liftmaster remote. Gate should open within 3 seconds. If no response, proceed to troubleshooting.
2
Check the status light
Green = ready. Amber = hold/delay active. Red = fault condition. If red, do not attempt repeated entry — go to reset procedure.
Reset procedure
Gate controller box is on the left pillar, behind the brushed steel panel. Access code: 4421
1
Power cycle the controller
Open the control box. Locate the main power switch on the right side. Flip it OFF, wait 10 seconds, then flip back ON. Wait 30 seconds for initialization.
2
Check the loop sensors
Two sensors are embedded in the driveway. If a vehicle is parked over either loop, the gate will not close. Both LED indicators should be solid green.
3
Manual release (emergency)
Red emergency release cord is inside the control box. Pull firmly to disengage the motor. Gate can then be pushed manually. Call Liftmaster support at 800-528-2806.
4
Test and confirm
Test 3 full open/close cycles before leaving. Confirm auto-close timer is active (gate closes after 15 seconds). Log the reset in Frame.
Ready to execute?
Create a work order from this SOP
Opens a pre-filled work order with all reset steps as sub-tasks. Assign to a tech and track completion with timestamps.
Interior Cleaning SOP
Standard operating procedure · Last updated Apr 15, 2026 · Lido Property
Cleaning supplies are in the utility closet off the kitchen, room 117. Restocking: Broward Cleaning Co. — 954-555-0100.
Daily tasks
1
Entry and common areas
Sweep and mop entry foyer, great room, and hallways. Wipe all glass surfaces. Check for scuffs on walls and spot clean. Vacuum all rugs.
2
Kitchen and bar
Clean all countertops with stone-safe cleaner. Wipe down appliances. Check refrigerator for expired items. Clean bar sink and polish fixtures.
3
Bathrooms
Disinfect all surfaces, toilets, sinks, and showers. Replace towels and amenities. Check for plumbing drips and log in Frame.
Weekly deep clean
4
Windows and doors
Clean all interior window glass with Invisible Glass. Wipe door handles and frames. Check screens for damage.
5
Furniture and fixtures
Dust all surfaces, artwork, and light fixtures. Treat leather furniture with Leather Honey. Rotate cushions on upholstered pieces.
Ready to execute?
Create a housekeeping ticket from this SOP
Opens a pre-filled work order with all cleaning tasks as sub-tasks. Assign to the housekeeping team and track each room.
